languages.text: "Это наш мир, Ваша Светлость. Мы сожрем любого врага, что явится сюда".
"This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."
languages.original_text: "Это наш мир, Ваша Светлость. Мы сожрем любого врага, что явится сюда".

traits.locale_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."

languages.text: “这个世界属于我们，大人。任谁闯进来，我们都会把它撕成碎片。”
languages.original_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."

traits.locale_text: “这个世界属于我们，大人。任谁闯进来，我们都会把它撕成碎片。”

languages.text: "Bu dünya bize ait {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Buraya izinsiz giren herkesi paramparça ederiz."
languages.original_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."

traits.locale_text: "Bu dünya bize ait {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Buraya izinsiz giren herkesi paramparça ederiz."

languages.text: « Ce monde nous appartient, Votre Seigneurie. Nous mettrons tous les intrus en pièces. »
languages.original_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."

traits.locale_text: « Ce monde nous appartient, Votre Seigneurie. Nous mettrons tous les intrus en pièces. »

languages.text: «Este mundo nos pertenece, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Destrozaremos a los intrusos».
languages.original_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."

traits.locale_text: «Este mundo nos pertenece, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Destrozaremos a los intrusos».

languages.text: "Diese Welt gehört uns, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir reißen jeden Eindringling in Stücke."
languages.original_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Welt gehört uns, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir reißen jeden Eindringling in Stücke."

languages.text: 「この世界は我々のものです、{mf|閣下|閣下}。侵入者は、何者であれずたずたに引き裂いてやります」
languages.original_text: "This world belongs to us, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We'll tear any intruder to pieces."
